openFindings.title: Deep-research prompt for 002-content-routing-accuracy still dispatches against the pre-promotion path
openFindings.description: The promoted packet's live launch prompt still invokes `--spec-folder=.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/006-continuity-refactor-gates/002-content-routing-accuracy`, so rerunning the prompt from `010-search-and-routing-tuning` targets the retired 006 lineage instead of the promoted 010 tree. [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/010-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/prompts/deep-research-prompt.md:8] [SOURCE: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/010-search-and-routing-tuning/002-content-routing-accuracy/spec.md:6]

openFindings.title: Promoted root deep-review artifacts still preserve pre-promotion 017/018/019 verdicts
openFindings.description: The promoted root review outputs were not regenerated after the packets moved under `010-search-and-routing-tuning`: `001` still claims Stage 3 ignores `adaptiveFusionIntent`, `002` still claims metadata-only host selection is broken, and `003` still surfaces the old `019` FAIL lineage even though current configs point at 010 paths and the live runtime/docs show those specific remediations landed. openFindings.title: 003-graph-metadata-validation falsely claims the promoted tree has zero legacy plaintext graph-metadata files
openFindings.description: The implementation summary says phase `004` was retired because no legacy plaintext `graph-metadata` files remain and the post-backfill scan returned `legacyGraphMetadataFiles = 0`, but all three promoted root research packets (`001`, `002`, `003`) still store legacy text-format `graph-metadata.json` files that begin with `Packet:` instead of JSON. openFindings.title: 002-content-routing-accuracy publishes contradictory completion state across spec docs and metadata
openFindings.description: The promoted root `002` packet still declares `status: planned` in `spec.md`, while `tasks.md`, `checklist.md`, and the root `graph-metadata.json` all present the same packet as complete. That leaves resume, graph, and review surfaces without a single authoritative completion state for the promoted root packet.
